target.title: feat: add live provider model catalog helper
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `openclaw/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-live-runtime`, a public SDK route for provider plugins that can discover live model catalogs from a provider `/models` API.
- Route bundled providers with live model-list APIs through that SDK path: OpenCode Go, OpenAI, xAI, Chutes, Venice, DeepInfra, Vercel AI Gateway, and NVIDIA.
- Keep provider-owned static rows as metadata and offline fallback for capabilities, pricing, media limits, endpoint family, and configured rows.
- Fix `models list --all --provider ...` so provider runtime catalog hooks are tried before stale static manifest rows when the provider has a live runtime catalog.
- Update plugin-builder docs, SDK subpath docs, package exports, API metadata, and the SDK API baseline hash.

## How it works
Provider plugins keep static catalog rows as canonical metadata and fallback. A provider with a model-list API can call `buildLiveModelProviderConfig(...)` for OpenAI-style model IDs, or `getCachedLiveProviderModelRows(...)` / `fetchLiveProviderModelRows(...)` when it needs to project richer API rows into OpenClaw model definitions.

The SDK helper performs an SSRF-guarded fetch, composes caller abort signals with a bounded timeout, builds provider/discovery auth headers, parses OpenAI-style `{ data: [...] }` and top-level array bodies by default, releases guarded fetch resources, caches successful live rows by provider/endpoint/credential with a bounded process-local TTL cache, throws structured `LiveModelCatalogHttpError` for HTTP fallback handling, and falls back to provider-owned static rows when live discovery is unavailable.

OpenAI stays scoped to the `openai` provider id; Azure hook aliases remain hook aliases only. OpenCode Go is marked runtime-discovered so model browsing loads the plugin runtime instead of stopping at the stale two-row manifest catalog. xAI OAuth discovery uses the Grok CLI proxy `/v1/models` endpoint. Chutes preserves its bounded token/fallback cache while using the SDK fetch route. DeepInfra, Venice, Vercel AI Gateway, NVIDIA, and OpenCode Go share the guarded live-model fetch path while retaining provider-specific parsing.

## Maintainer decision surface
Landing this PR intentionally publishes the new `openclaw/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-live-runtime` subpath as a plugin SDK contract and intentionally lets authenticated live catalogs win over static rows for provider-filtered model listing when a provider has a runtime catalog hook. Static fallback remains available when live discovery is unavailable.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts extensions/xai/index.test.ts src/commands/models/list.provider-catalog.test.ts src/commands/models/list.source-plan.test.ts src/commands/models/list.list-command.forward-compat.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-auth-runtime.test.ts extensions/deepinfra/provider-models.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/qa-runner-runtime.integration.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check`
- `git diff --check upstream/main..HEAD`
- `corepack pnpm openclaw models list --all --provider openai --json`
- `corepack pnpm openclaw models list --all --provider xai --json`
- `corepack pnpm openclaw models list --all --provider opencode-go --json`
- xAI OAuth live catalog smoke against PR head `10805c5a62f75241e9e8fabece32b69b782791ed`, using the installed runtime only to resolve the already-configured local OAuth credential and the PR checkout's xAI catalog mapper for the `/v1/models` call.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: provider plugins now have a reusable SDK route for live model discovery, bundled providers with model-list APIs use it, and user-facing `models list` reaches runtime catalog hooks instead of stopping at stale static manifest rows.

Real environment tested:
- Local OpenClaw checkout on PR head `10805c5a62f75241e9e8fabece32b69b782791ed`.
- Crabbox AWS Linux smoke on earlier PR head `fc7007e82b983bbdbc77818ef877eb767b8a3ac7`, run `run_4d0150612794`, for public unauthenticated live providers.
- Local authenticated provider smoke with local auth profiles or existing runtime OAuth credentials. OpenCode Go uses API-key/token auth; OpenAI and xAI use OAuth-style local auth.

Sanitization applied before posting: token values, bearer headers, account IDs, auth profile IDs, email/account text, local filesystem paths, raw machine targets, and process identifiers are omitted or redacted. Logs preserve provider names, endpoint URLs, HTTP statuses or command exit status, durations, returned counts, auth modes, and model IDs.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts extensions/xai/index.test.ts src/commands/models/list.provider-catalog.test.ts src/commands/models/list.source-plan.test.ts src/commands/models/list.list-command.forward-compat.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-auth-runtime.test.ts extensions/deepinfra/provider-models.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/qa-runner-runtime.integration.test.ts
corepack pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check
git diff --check upstream/main..HEAD
corepack pnpm openclaw models list --all --provider openai --json
corepack pnpm openclaw models list --all --provider xai --json
corepack pnpm openclaw models list --all --provider opencode-go --json
pnpm exec tsx <<'TS'
# resolve local xAI OAuth credential with installed OpenClaw runtime, token redacted
# call PR checkout buildLiveXaiOAuthProvider({ discoveryApiKey })
# log sanitized endpoint, auth mode, duration, mapped ids, and composer presence
TS
```

Evidence after fix:

Crabbox public-provider live catalog proof:
```text
[smoke] deepinfra
[smoke] chutes
[smoke] venice
[smoke] nvidia
[smoke] vercel-ai-gateway
OPENCLAW_LIVE_CATALOG_PUBLIC_SMOKE_RESULT={"ok":true,"results":[{"provider":"deepinfra","rawRows":147,"mappedModels":93,"sampleIds":["stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash","zai-org/GLM-5.1","MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5","moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5","nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B"]},{"provider":"chutes","rawRows":12,"mappedModels":12,"sampleIds":["Qwen/Qwen3-32B-TEE","google/gemma-4-31B-turbo-TEE","Qwen/Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-TEE","zai-org/GLM-5.1-TEE","moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5-TEE"]},{"provider":"venice","rawRows":85,"mappedModels":85,"sampleIds":["zai-org-glm-5-1","zai-org-glm-5","z-ai-glm-5-turbo","z-ai-glm-5v-turbo","olafangensan-glm-4.7-flash-heretic"]},{"provider":"nvidia","rawRows":4,"mappedModels":4,"sampleIds":["nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b","z-ai/glm-5.1","minimaxai/minimax-m2.7","moonshotai/kimi-k2.5"]},{"provider":"vercel-ai-gateway","rawRows":283,"mappedModels":283,"sampleIds":["alibaba/qwen-3-14b","alibaba/qwen-3-235b","alibaba/qwen-3-30b","alibaba/qwen-3-32b","alibaba/qwen-3.6-max-preview"]}]}
command complete in 8.718s total=2m31.274s
run details provider=aws run=run_4d0150612794 label="pr90029-live-catalog-public-aws-repo-script" type=c7a.8xlarge
```

Observed result after fix: focused tests passed, SDK API metadata is current after merging `main`, no conflict markers/whitespace issues remain, OpenAI/xAI/OpenCode Go model-list commands return the expected OpenClaw row shape, OpenCode Go returns 18 available live rows, and xAI OAuth live `/v1/models` returns `grok-composer-2.5-fast` through the PR provider catalog mapper.

What was not tested: authenticated completion calls for every discovered model were not run; this proof is scoped to live model-list discovery and OpenClaw catalog row mapping.
